lines.text: Well, Rover was the one that rescued all of them and even comes to visit every now and then. Of course, they love {Male=him;Female=her}.
lines.quest_name: Save the World? Save the Cat!

lines.text: Rover, the rescue team was able to save so many cats and earn its name all thanks to you!
lines.quest_name: Save the World? Save the Cat!

lines.text: You are our key supporter of the Kitty Rescue Project. Please allow me to appoint you as Captain of the Kitty Rescue Team!
lines.quest_name: Save the World? Save the Cat!

lines.text: I'm the Vice-Captain! I shall become invincible under the protection of the Captain's formidable powers!
lines.quest_name: Save the World? Save the Cat!

lines.text: Bravo! My love! My best buddy! Our work of saving cats continues!
lines.quest_name: Save the World? Save the Cat!
Save the World? Save the Cat!
